mapper.insert: insert into BSC_BOND (VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, VC_BOND_YEAR, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_ISSUE_ENTITY, L_BOND_FORM, C_IS_COLLECTIONBILL, L_BOND_TYPE, L_BOND_ASSET, C_IS_COLLECTIONENTERPRISEDEBT, L_OTHER_CLASSIFICATION, L_BONDINTEREST_TYPE, EN_COUPONRATE, L_INTECALC_METHOD, L_INTEREST_TYPE, L_INTERESTPAY_TYPE, L_INTECALC_RULE, L_BENCHMARKRATE_TYPE, EN_BENCHMARKMARGIN, C_IS_GUARANTY, EN_GUARANTY_RATE, L_RATE_ADJUSTMODE, L_OFFER_DATE, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_CEASE_DATE, L_END_DATE, EN_MATURITY, EN_PAR_VALUE, EN_ISSUE_PRICE, EN_ISSUE_SCALE, C_IS_CALLBOND, L_CALL_DATE, C_IS_PUTBOND, L_PUT_DATE, C_IS_CCBOND, C_IS_EWBOND, C_IS_STRIPS, C_IS_EXCHGBOND, C_IF_GUARANTEE, C_IS_GOVSUPPORT_BOND, C_PROGRESSIVE_TYPE, EN_PROGRESSIVE_RATE, VC_CREDIT_RANK, L_EXTCREDIT_ENHANCEMODE, L_STUB_ADJUSTMENT, D_UPDATETIME, VC_DATA_SOURCE, D_SRC_UPDATETIME, L_SOURCE_ID, C_IS_SUSTAINBOND, VC_BONDGROUP_CODE, C_IS_PERPETUAL, C_AS_BOND_OR_EQUITY, VC_TEMP_CODE, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcScode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBondCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lMarket,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcBondYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcCompanyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcIssueEntity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lBondForm,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsCollectionbill,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lBondType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBondAsset,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsCollectionenterprisedebt,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lOtherClassification,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBondinterestType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enCouponrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lIntecalcMethod,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lInterestType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lInterestpayType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lIntecalcRule,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBenchmarkrateType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enBenchmarkmargin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsGuaranty,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enGuarantyRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lRateAdjustmode,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lOfferDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lCeaseDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEndDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enMaturity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enParValue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enIssuePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enIssueScale,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsCallbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lCallDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsPutbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lPutDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsCcbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cIsEwbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cIsStrips,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cIsExchgbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cIfGuarantee,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cIsGovsupportBond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cProgressiveType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enProgressiveRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcCreditRank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lExtcreditEnhancemode,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lStubAdjustment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{vcDataSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dSrcUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lSourceId,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cIsSustainbond,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcBondgroupCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cIsPerpetual,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cAsBondOrEquity,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcTempCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, VC_BOND_YEAR, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_ISSUE_ENTITY, L_BOND_FORM, C_IS_COLLECTIONBILL, L_BOND_TYPE, L_BOND_ASSET, C_IS_COLLECTIONENTERPRISEDEBT, L_OTHER_CLASSIFICATION, L_BONDINTEREST_TYPE, EN_COUPONRATE, L_INTECALC_METHOD, L_INTEREST_TYPE, L_INTERESTPAY_TYPE, L_INTECALC_RULE, L_BENCHMARKRATE_TYPE, EN_BENCHMARKMARGIN, C_IS_GUARANTY, EN_GUARANTY_RATE, L_RATE_ADJUSTMODE, L_OFFER_DATE, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_CEASE_DATE, L_END_DATE, EN_MATURITY, EN_PAR_VALUE, EN_ISSUE_PRICE, EN_ISSUE_SCALE, C_IS_CALLBOND, L_CALL_DATE, C_IS_PUTBOND, L_PUT_DATE, C_IS_CCBOND, C_IS_EWBOND, C_IS_STRIPS, C_IS_EXCHGBOND, C_IF_GUARANTEE, C_IS_GOVSUPPORT_BOND, C_PROGRESSIVE_TYPE, EN_PROGRESSIVE_RATE, VC_CREDIT_RANK, L_EXTCREDIT_ENHANCEMODE, L_STUB_ADJUSTMENT, D_UPDATETIME, VC_DATA_SOURCE, D_SRC_UPDATETIME, L_SOURCE_ID, C_IS_SUSTAINBOND, VC_BONDGROUP_CODE, C_IS_PERPETUAL, C_AS_BOND_OR_EQUITY, VC_TEMP_CODE, ETL_TIME from BSC_BOND
